faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Bed-Stuy for aggressive yellow jacket infestations. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, with immediate relief from yellow jacket activity. Our team arrives fully equipped to safely eliminate nests from any location on your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 yellow jacket removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes complete nest inspection and location, professional-grade treatment to eliminate all yellow jackets, nest removal when accessible, and a 30-day warranty. Pricing varies based on nest size, location difficulty (ground vs. high elevation), and the number of nests on your property.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to my Bed-Stuy brownstone or garden?
faqs.answer: Yellow jackets are highly aggressive when defending their nests and can sting repeatedly, posing serious health risks especially to children, pets, and those with allergies. They commonly nest in wall voids, under porches, in gardens, and around trash areas, becoming more defensive in late summer and fall when colonies are largest.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have yellow jackets vs. other wasps or bees?
faqs.answer: Yellow jackets have distinctive bright yellow and black stripes, are smaller than hornets, and build paper-like nests in protected areas or underground. Unlike honey bees, they're aggressive scavengers attracted to food and trash. If you see multiple wasps flying in and out of a specific location or notice increased wasp activity near your home, you likely have a yellow jacket nest requiring professional removal.
